creator: commit-hook@FreeBSD.org
text:
A commit in branch main references this bug:

URL: https://cgit.FreeBSD.org/ports/commit/?id=a25d5d1ba88bbce89e77389a287dd3292b0b8d17

commit a25d5d1ba88bbce89e77389a287dd3292b0b8d17
Author:     Laurent Chardon <laurent.chardon@gmail.com>
AuthorDate: 2024-06-12 07:28:28 +0000
Commit:     Fernando Apesteguía <fernape@FreeBSD.org>
CommitDate: 2024-06-14 06:32:48 +0000

    sysutils/nerdctl: Upgrade to 1.7.6

    ChangeLog: https://github.com/containerd/nerdctl/releases/tag/v1.7.6

    Accumulated changes since 1.7.3:

     * rootless: fix nerdctl rm failure with AppArmor on Ubuntu >= 23.10
     * nerdctl-full: update containerd (1.7.16)
     * nerdctl-full: update containerd (1.7.14), slirp4netns (1.2.3), CNI plugins
       (1.4.1), RootlessKit (2.0.2), Kubo (0.27.0), imgcrypt (1.1.10)
     * rootless: Fix incompatibility with firewalld (Not Authorized(uid):
       org.fedoraproject.FirewallD1.config)
     * nerdctl-full: Update RootlessKit (2.0.1)

    PR:             279569
    Reported by:    laurent.chardon@gmail.com dmaintainer)

 sysutils/nerdctl/Makefile |  5 ++---
 sysutils/nerdctl/distinfo | 10 +++++-----
 2 files changed, 7 insertions(+), 8 deletions(-)
